meaning: adj.有盖子的 盖着盖子的 覆盖着的
examples: Julie squinted at her through lidded eyes.
And store your outside garbage in a lidded can, while away from doors and windows.
Mix all ingredients and store in a tight-lidded jar.
Pour water into the bottom of a lidded deep pot wide enough to hold 9-inch cake pan.
These can include repellents and making sure that waste food is always disposed of in secure, lidded bins and containers.
